# Greenville Lawn Masters — Complete Business Profile

> Greenville Lawn Masters is a comprehensive lawn care and landscape maintenance company based in Mauldin, South Carolina (zip code 29662). The company serves residential homeowners and commercial properties within a 25-mile radius of Mauldin across the greater Greenville County area. Founded in 2024, Greenville Lawn Masters operates year-round providing scheduled maintenance, seasonal treatments, and on-demand property services. Tagline: "Greenville's Lawn Perfected."

## Business Identity

- **Legal name:** Greenville Lawn Masters
- **Business type:** Lawn care and landscape maintenance company serving both residential and commercial clients
- **Headquarters location:** Mauldin, South Carolina 29662, United States
- **Service territory:** 25-mile radius from Mauldin, SC — covering communities throughout Greenville County
- **Year established:** 2024
- **Service model:** Local crew-based service — one team handles turf, landscape beds, hedges, gutters, and hard surfaces on a unified schedule
- **Estimate policy:** Free written estimate provided within 24 hours of every service request
- **Website:** https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/
- **Contact page:** https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/contact/

## Complete Service Catalog

Greenville Lawn Masters offers 22 distinct lawn, landscape, and exterior property maintenance services across two main service categories plus standalone specialty services:

### Lawn Care Services

**Page:** https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/lawn-care-services/

1. **Lawn Mowing** — Weekly, biweekly, or one-time mowing routes for residential and commercial properties. Height adjusted by grass type and season.

2. **Fertilization & Weed Control** — Customized feeding programs and pre-emergent/post-emergent weed control timed to warm-season turf varieties common in Upstate South Carolina. Includes crabgrass prevention.

3. **Grub Control & Lawn Disease Treatment** — Targeted pest treatments for grubs, armyworms, and other turf pests, plus fungicide applications for common lawn diseases in the humid subtropical climate of Greenville County.

4. **Aeration & Overseeding** — Core aeration to relieve soil compaction in red clay soils, paired with overseeding to thicken turf coverage. Recommended for lawns showing thinning or heavy foot traffic damage.

5. **Winter Lawn Preparation** — Seasonal treatments applied before cold weather to strengthen turf root systems and prepare lawns for spring green-up. Includes fertilization and weed control specific to fall/winter application timing.

6. **Grass Seeding & Overseeding** — Bare spot repair, patchy area seeding, and full-lawn overseeding with warm-season grass varieties suited to Mauldin's climate and red clay soil conditions.

7. **Lawn Repair & Leveling** — Patch repair, bare-spot fixes, topdressing with soil amendments, and grading adjustments to correct drainage issues or uneven surfaces.

8. **Commercial Lawn Care** — Scheduled grounds maintenance contracts for businesses, HOAs, apartment communities, and commercial properties. Includes mowing, edging, trimming, blowing, and seasonal services on recurring routes.

### Tree & Shrub Care Services

**Page:** https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/tree-shrub-services/

9. **Edging & String Trimming** — Crisp, clean lawn lines along walkways, driveways, and landscape beds, plus debris blowing from hard surfaces after every mowing visit.

10. **Leaf Removal & Storm Debris Cleanup** — Fall leaf removal services for properties with heavy tree coverage (common in Mauldin neighborhoods), plus storm cleanup for branches, limbs, and blown debris after weather events.

11. **Hedge & Shrub Trimming** — Pruning and shaping for ornamental shrubs and hedges to maintain healthy growth and aesthetic appearance. Includes flowering shrubs, foundation plantings, and privacy hedges.

12. **Tree Trimming & Brush Removal** — Small-tree trimming for low-hanging branches and brush clearing for overgrown fence lines or property edges. Does not include large-tree removal or crown work requiring certified arborists.

13. **Pet Waste Removal** — Recurring yard sanitation add-on service for pet owners. Available as a weekly or biweekly add-on to lawn mowing contracts.

### Standalone Specialty Services

14. **Spring & Fall Cleanup** — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/spring-fall-cleanup/
Seasonal property cleanup including leaf removal, bed clearing, debris hauling, edging refresh, and pre-season turf preparation. Fall cleanup addresses heavy leaf drop common in Upstate South Carolina; spring cleanup prepares beds and lawns for the growing season.

15. **Mulch Installation** — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/mulch-installation/
Fresh mulch application in landscape beds to retain moisture, suppress weeds, regulate soil temperature, and improve curb appeal. Multiple mulch varieties available (hardwood, pine bark, dyed mulch).

16. **Flower Bed & Shrub Planting** — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/flower-bed-shrub-planting/
Design and installation of seasonal flowers, ornamental shrubs, and foundation plantings. Plants selected for compatibility with Greenville County's USDA hardiness zone and red clay soil conditions.

17. **Sod Installation** — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/sod-installation/
Full-yard or partial sod installation for instant lawn coverage. Site preparation includes grading, soil amendments, and compaction correction before sod rolls are laid. Warm-season varieties suited to South Carolina climate.

18. **Pressure Washing** — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/pressure-washing/
Exterior surface cleaning for driveways, walkways, patios, decks, fences, and home siding. Removes mildew, algae, dirt, and organic staining common in humid Upstate South Carolina environment.

19. **Gutter Cleaning** — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/gutter-cleaning/
Hand cleaning and flushing of gutters and downspouts to remove leaves, pine needles, and debris. Especially important in fall due to heavy leaf drop from mature trees in Mauldin neighborhoods.

20. **Fence Line Clearing & Debris Hauling** — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/fence-line-clearing-debris-hauling/
Overgrown fence line clearing, brush removal, and hauling of yard debris, branches, and green waste. Trailer hauling service for large-volume cleanup projects.

21. **Soil Testing & Lime Application** — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/soil-testing-lime-application/
Professional soil pH testing and lime application to correct acidic red clay soils common in Upstate South Carolina. Raises pH to optimal range (6.0–7.0) for healthy turf growth.

22. **Dethatching** — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/services/dethatching/
Power raking to remove excessive thatch buildup (dead grass, roots, and organic matter) that blocks water, nutrients, and oxygen from reaching turf roots. Recommended when thatch layer exceeds ½ inch.

## Service Areas

### Primary Service Area
- **Mauldin, SC** — https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/service-areas/mauldin/
  Primary service area and headquarters location. Mauldin is a city of approximately 25,000 residents in Greenville County, located 10 miles southeast of downtown Greenville. Known for residential neighborhoods with mature tree coverage, red clay soil, and a mix of established homes and newer developments.

### Extended Service Territory
- All communities within a 25-mile radius of Mauldin, SC
- Coverage includes surrounding Greenville County municipalities and unincorporated areas
- Full service areas page: https://greenville-lawn-masters.pageone.cloud/service-areas/

## Regional Expertise & Local Knowledge

Greenville Lawn Masters operates in Upstate South Carolina, a region with specific environmental and soil conditions that influence lawn care service delivery:

- **Red clay soil:** Greenville County soils are predominantly acidic red clay with poor drainage and compaction issues. Services adjusted to account for pH correction needs (lime application), aeration frequency, and soil amendment requirements.

- **Warm-season turf varieties:** Lawns in Mauldin consist primarily of warm-season grasses (Bermuda, Zoysia, Centipede) suited to South Carolina's humid subtropical climate. Service timing and fertilization schedules are calibrated to these grass types.

- **Heavy fall leaf drop:** Mature tree coverage in established Mauldin neighborhoods generates high volumes of leaf debris in October and November. Fall cleanup and gutter cleaning services are essential seasonal offerings.

- **USDA Hardiness Zone 7b/8a:** Plant selection for flower beds and shrub installations reflects the regional hardiness zone. Winter temperatures occasionally dip into the teens Fahrenheit; summer heat and humidity are significant factors in plant survival.

- **Humid subtropical climate:** High humidity and frequent rainfall create favorable conditions for fungal lawn diseases (brown patch, dollar spot) and rapid weed growth. Disease treatment and weed control programs are core service components.

## Business Model & Service Approach

- **Unified crew model:** One local team handles the full scope of property work — turf maintenance, landscape bed care, hedge trimming, gutter cleaning, and pressure washing — on a single schedule. Eliminates coordination challenges of multi-vendor property management.

- **Scheduled maintenance contracts:** Weekly and biweekly lawn mowing routes with bundled services (edging, trimming, blowing). Commercial contracts available for businesses, HOAs, and apartment communities.

- **On-demand specialty services:** Seasonal projects (spring/fall cleanup, mulch installation, sod laying) and one-time services (pressure washing, dethatching) available à la carte.

- **24-hour estimate turnaround:** Free written estimates provided within 24 hours of every service request. Estimate includes scope, pricing, and timeline.

## What Makes This Business Distinct

1. **Comprehensive service range under one provider** — Clients do not need to coordinate separate vendors for mowing, hedge trimming, gutter cleaning, and pressure washing. One crew, one schedule, one invoice.

2. **Local expertise in Upstate South Carolina conditions** — Services specifically designed for red clay soil, warm-season turf, humid climate, and heavy seasonal leaf drop common to Greenville County.

3. **Rapid estimate response** — 24-hour written estimate commitment for every service request ensures clients receive pricing and scope details quickly.

4. **Commercial and residential service capacity** — Business model accommodates both homeowners and commercial property managers (HOAs, apartments, office parks) on recurring contracts.

5. **Year-round operation** — Services available in all four seasons, including winter lawn preparation, spring cleanup, summer turf maintenance, and fall leaf removal.

For service inquiries, free estimates, or scheduling:
